mechanics.text:
HISTORY
THE WARRIORS Of KERENBKY The men and women who had followed Kerensky in order to preserve the ideals of the Star League had made planetfall on five worlds called the Pentagon Within two decades_ they had degenerated into vicious_ fratricidal conflict later known as the Exodus Civil War: Determined to salvage something from the wreckage of his father's dream, Kerensky $ son Nicholas led his Ioyal followers on second Exodus t0 safe haven, where together they forged the eugenics-based warrior society later known as the Clans Returning to the Pentagon worlds, the Clans conquered them and began preparing for the day they would return to the Inner Sphere and restore the Star League_ In 3005_ they sent unit of Clan Wolf warriors vanguard Wolf's Dragoons_ soon to become famed mercenary unit in the Inner Sphere_ The Dragoons fought for each of the Successor States in turn testing the strength of their militaries and sending intelligence back to the Clans.
CLAN INVASION In March of 3050,the Clans struck in force hammering the Draconis Combine, the Free Rasalhague Republic and the Lyran side of the Federated Commonwealth Wave after wave of Clan attacks followed, executed with  blinding speed and ruthless efficiency: Using their technologically superior OmniMechs ad tenacious armored infantry; known as Elementals Clan warriors cut down their Inner Sphere opponents like wheat before scythe. Four Clans rolled across the Inner Sphere the first wave: Smoke Jaguar, Ghost Bear, Jade Falcon ad Wolf. All took tneir share planets_ but Clan Wolf conquered more worlds than all its compatriots Inner Sphere forces aunched few successful counterattacks_ but those strikes came too Iittle ad too late_ The Clan juggernaut thundered on; halted only when an unlikely catastropne struck: October 3050 Rasalhagian pilot   named Tyra Miraborg crashed her Shilone fighter into the Clan flagship Dire Wolf;, killing the Clans' eader: The death of the iIKhan accon: plished what six months of desperate fighting had not; the Clans ended their assaults garrisoned the worlds they had conquered
182
